properties.name: gemini.model
properties.description: Model name for Gemini Service (e.g., gemini-1.5-flash).

properties.name: sepay.api-key
properties.description: API Key of SePay to authenticate incoming webhooks.

properties.name: sepay.bank-id
properties.description: Bank short name or ID (e.g., vietcombank).

properties.name: sepay.account-number
properties.description: Account number of the merchant bank account.

properties.name: sepay.account-name
properties.description: Account name of the merchant bank account.
